case_title: CONLEY, OWEN D. vs. MUNGUIA, SERGIO

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, SERGIO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNGUIA, SERGIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 940 GUERRERO STREET #10, S.F. $283.79 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $283.79, STAYED UNTIL OCT-13-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO PAY $ 283.79 BY 04:00PM ON 10/01/98 OR PLTF MAY HAVE S/E LIFTED.
